question: 把 The Minimal Snowboard 的库存增加 5 件。

judge.reasoning: 助手正确调用了 query_store_data（两次）和 update_inventory，满足工具选择要求；但违反了 rubric 中‘没直接执行、应返回 preview 并要求用户确认’的核心指令——工具调用记录显示 update_inventory 已成功执行（ok: true），而最终回复却仍以‘请确认是否执行’结尾，逻辑矛盾；此外，preview 中‘当前库存: 未记录（null）’说明未成功获取原始 inventoryQuantity，表明首次查询未有效提取该字段，导致预览信息不完整。

tool_calls.name: query_store_data
tool_calls.arguments: {"query": "query GetProduct($handle: String!) { product(handle: $handle) { id title variants(first: 10) { edges { node { id sku inventoryQuantity inventoryItem { id } } } } } }", "variables": {"handle": "the-minimal-snowboard"}}
tool_calls.error: Shopify GraphQL errors: Field 'product' is missing required arguments: id | Field 'product' doesn't accept argument 'handle' | Variable $handle is declared by GetProduct but not used

tool_calls.name: query_store_data
tool_calls.arguments: {"query": "query GetProductByTitle($title: String!) { products(first: 1, query: $title) { edges { node { id title variants(first: 10) { edges { node { id sku inventoryQuantity inventoryItem { id } } } } } } } }", "variables": {"title": "title:\\\"The Minimal Snowboard\\\""}}

tool_calls.name: query_store_data
tool_calls.arguments: {"query": "query GetLocations { shop { locations(first: 10) { edges { node { id name } } } } }"}
